name: RPG Politics 2
description: An RPG civilization mod for Minecraft 26.2: elected government with perks, a judiciary with Court Domains, RPG combat stats and abilities, legendary gear, bounty-hunt slayer progression, a coin/credit economy with crypto & stock markets, banking, auctions, homes, checkpoints, parties, and live mob scaling. Adds a unified Energy power system merging The Boys' Compound V serums with Jujutsu Kaisen cursed techniques, a graded Curses faction to exorcise, and RPG-style interactive villager NPCs. Runs on client and server.
